name: Wigglin' Jigglin' Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups boiling water (do not add cold water)
1 package (2-layer size) yellow or chocolate cake mix
or yellow or chocolate cake mix with pudding in the mix
1 tub (12 ounces) frozen whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into gelatin in a medium bowl for at least 3 minutes until completely dissolved.
2. Pour the mixture into a 15-by-10-inch pan. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until firm.
3. Meanwhile, prepare and bake the cake according to package directions for 24 cupcakes. Cool completely on wire racks.
4. Cut each cupcake in half horizontally.
5. Dip the bottom of the 15-by-10-inch pan in warm water for about 15 seconds.
6. Using a 2-inch round cookie cutter, cut out 24 Jiggler circles.
7. Place a small dollop of whipped topping on the bottom half of each cupcake.
8. Place a Jiggler circle atop each and add another small dollop of whipped topping.
9. Place the top half of each cupcake on the stacks and gently press onto the whipped topping.
10. Top with additional whipped topping and sprinkles.
11. Makes 24 cupcakes.
